Nanjing Iveco Motor Company Ltd. (NAVECO) is a highly active, globally recognized Sino-Foreign joint venture and a Tier-1 complete vehicle manufacturer. The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely eradicated. Unlike many misclassified shells, this entity perfectly matches its 'Large Enterprise' and 'Complete Automobile Manufacturer' registry tags. With a colossal 2.52 Billion RMB paid-in capital and a massive workforce of 1,755 employees, it operates a world-class manufacturing base in Pukou, Nanjing. A fascinating and critical detail in its business scope is the 'Class I, II, and III medical device sales' license. This is not a pivot to healthcare, but a strategic necessity: NAVECO's commercial vehicle chassis dominate the specialized ambulance market. The medical device licenses allow them to manufacture and directly sell fully-equipped medical ambulances and mobile ICUs, acting as both an automaker and a specialized medical vehicle provider.
